I don't want to sound like a victime and dragging this whole thing cause it's been two years by now and i've pretty much moved on, but what i did before was really dumb, i should have not took Bluegiragi's art. To be honest i really didn't know they didn't want their arts to be used for ai chatbot but even after knowing it i didn't change the bot's image and kept it for a while until the devs told me to change it. It was selfish of me cause others were doing the same thing and i thought since they're doing it what's so bad about me doing the same? It was a stupid conclusion from me but i've learn my lesson now.
